title: Local Component
description: Structured description of a local screen-specific component. This contract supports traceability and must not be used to declare package exports.

name.description: Local component name used inside the generated screen.

classification.description: Classification used in the GenAI reasoning hierarchy agent output contract.

purpose.description: What the component helps the user understand, decide or do.

user_need.description: User need or interaction need addressed by the local component.

reason_existing_ds_material_was_insuffic.description: Why exported components or primitives did not adequately fit the brief.

package_import_status.description: Local components must not be imported from the package unless explicitly exported.

reused_ds_material.description: Package primitives, components, tokens or visual conventions reused by the local component.

guardrails.description: Relevant hard blockers or non-negotiable principles preserved by the local component.

candidate_notes.description: Optional notes explaining whether the component reveals a design-system evolution opportunity.

source_guidelines.description: Guideline paths used to justify this local component.
